breaking.title: At least two dead, 19 wounded as Russia strikes Ukraine with missiles, drones
breaking.summary: The attack damaged a non-residential ​building in ‌one district, while smoke was coming from another and an office building was ‌in flames as a ​result of the strike, the city military ⁠administration said on the Telegram messaging app

breaking.title: Indian tourists among 15 killed as speedboat capsizes in Vietnam
breaking.summary: Local media say 21 people were saved after the boat overturned in rough seas near an island in south Vietnam.

breaking.title: Spain battles to contain one of its deadliest wildfires as at least 12 killed
breaking.summary: At least four Britons are believed to be among the victims of the blaze, which left another 23 people missing.

breaking.title: ‘I’ll play for India’: Popular US streamer IShowSpeed makes bold offer to help nation qualify for 2030 FIFA World Cup
breaking.summary: IShowSpeed joked that he would play for India’s national football team and help the country qualify for the 2030 World Cup. The YouTuber made the comments during a livestream while watching Spain vs Belgium. He said he could play as a winger, striker or attacking midfielder. While FIFA rules make the idea unrealistic, his support drew attention from football fans.

breaking.title: Pakistan claims 88 militants killed in ongoing Balochistan crackdown
breaking.summary: Pakistan's security forces have killed eighty-eight militants in Balochistan since July fifth. Operation Shaban involves the army and paramilitary forces targeting militant hideouts. This operation began after coordinated attacks rocked the province on July fifth. Militants killed nine police personnel and abducted eighteen others at a checkpoint. Violence also struck a local tribe, killing five and abducting eleven individuals.

breaking.title: Watch: 'We escaped Spanish wildfire, but our friends lost their lives'
breaking.summary: Hundreds of firefighters in Spain have been battling a deadly wildfire in the south of the country.

breaking.title: Manipur CM vows arrest of all accused in killing of six Naga civilians
breaking.summary: Mr. Khemchand Singh’s comments came a day after a team of security officials led by the National Investigation Agency arrested two persons for their alleged involvement in the killings

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Iran's supreme leader pledges revenge for slain father and predecessor
breaking.summary: Iran's supreme leader ​Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei said ‌that ​avenging his ⁠slain predecessor and father was "the demand of ‌the nation" and "must certainly" take ‌place, according ‌to ⁠a written ⁠message released on his Telegram account
